Strategic Partnership for Commercial Finance Excellence

Professional commercial finance brokerage dedicated to empowering Australian business builders with strategic funding solutions. Combining industry expertise, AI-enhanced analytics, and personalized service for sustainable growth.

Start Your Partnership Meet the Team

Our Story: Built for Business Builders

Edgeview Finance Business Solutions was founded with a singular mission: to provide strategic commercial finance partnerships that truly understand the journey of business builders like Ben.

We recognized that commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses needed more than just funding – they needed a strategic partner who understood their cash flow cycles, growth challenges, and the unique opportunities within sustainable commercial sectors.

Our approach combines traditional finance brokerage expertise with cutting-edge AI-enhanced analytics, delivering insights that help our clients make informed decisions and structure optimal finance solutions aligned with their business objectives.

We deliberately focus on commercial sectors with stable cash flows and exclude residential building to concentrate our expertise where we can deliver maximum value and sustainable partnerships.

500+
Strategic Finance Solutions
$50M+
Funding Facilitated
95%
Client Satisfaction Rate

Meet the Strategic Finance Partnership Team

Our professional team combines deep commercial finance expertise with industry specialization to deliver strategic partnerships for Australian business builders.

MB

Michael Blake

Principal & Commercial Finance Strategist

Qualifications: Certificate IV in Finance & Mortgage Broking, Diploma of Financial Services
License: Australian Credit License Representative

With over 12 years in commercial finance, Michael specializes in strategic funding solutions for established trade businesses. His deep understanding of cash flow cycles in commercial trades, civil contracting, and industrial sectors enables him to structure optimal finance packages that align with business growth objectives. Michael's expertise in AI-enhanced financial analysis provides clients with data-driven insights for informed decision-making.

Equipment Finance Commercial Property Strategic Planning
SC

Sarah Chen

Senior Commercial Analyst & Technology Integration Specialist

Qualifications: Bachelor of Commerce (Finance), CPA Australia
Specialization: Financial Technology & AI Analytics

Sarah brings extensive financial analysis expertise with specialized focus on AI-enhanced business assessment. Her background in corporate finance and advanced data analytics enables the delivery of sophisticated financial modeling and predictive insights. Sarah leads our technology integration initiatives, ensuring clients benefit from cutting-edge analytical tools in their finance evaluation and structuring process.

Financial Analysis AI Technology Business Intelligence
DM

David Morrison

Industry Relations Manager & Compliance Specialist

Qualifications: Graduate Diploma Financial Planning, FBAA Certified
Memberships: Finance Brokers Association of Australia, Australian Institute of Credit Management

David manages our extensive network of specialist commercial lenders and ensures full regulatory compliance across all operations. With background in both finance brokerage and compliance management, David maintains the professional standards and industry relationships that enable optimal client outcomes. His expertise ensures every finance solution meets ASIC requirements and industry best practices.

Lender Relations Compliance Management Industry Standards

Collective Professional Expertise

🎯

Strategic Finance Planning

Advanced qualification in commercial finance structuring with deep understanding of business growth cycles and strategic funding requirements for sustainable expansion.

🏗️

Commercial Trades Specialization

Extensive experience in commercial trades, civil contracting, and industrial sectors. We understand project cash flows, payment terms, and industry-specific challenges.

🤖

AI-Enhanced Analytics

Pioneering use of artificial intelligence in financial analysis, providing data-driven insights for optimal finance structure and borrowing capacity assessment.

⚖️

Professional Compliance

Full ASIC compliance with Australian Credit License credentials. Commitment to professional standards, transparent service, and ethical business practices.

Technology-Enhanced Service Delivery

AI-Driven Financial Intelligence

We leverage advanced artificial intelligence to transform your financial data into actionable insights. Our AI-enhanced approach provides comprehensive analysis of cash flow patterns, borrowing capacity, and optimal finance structuring for your specific business profile.

  • Predictive cash flow modeling and scenario analysis
  • Real-time borrowing capacity optimization
  • Industry benchmarking and performance insights
  • Strategic finance structure recommendations
  • Risk assessment and mitigation strategies

Smart Analysis

AI processes your business data to identify optimal financing opportunities and structure

Predictive Insights

Forward-looking analytics help anticipate funding needs and growth opportunities

Strategic Guidance

Data-driven recommendations align finance solutions with your business objectives

Our Professional Assessment Process

Every partnership begins with comprehensive evaluation to ensure finance solutions align perfectly with your business goals and capacity.

1

Discovery & Strategy

In-depth consultation to understand your business journey, growth objectives, and specific funding requirements as a business builder.

2

AI-Enhanced Analysis

Comprehensive financial assessment using advanced analytics to evaluate borrowing capacity, cash flow patterns, and optimal structure.

3

Strategic Structuring

Design tailored finance solutions aligned with your business cycle, growth timeline, and risk profile for sustainable outcomes.

4

Expert Presentation

Professional application management with our network of specialist commercial lenders to secure optimal terms and conditions.

Professional Credentials & Licensing

Australian Credit License

ACL: [License Number]

Licensed by the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) to provide credit assistance and brokerage services. Full regulatory compliance ensuring client protection and professional service standards.

Business Registration

ABN: [ABN Number]

Registered Australian business entity operating in full compliance with all regulatory requirements and professional standards.

Professional Memberships

FBAA Member

Active member of the Finance Brokers Association of Australia, committed to professional development and industry best practices.

Insurance & Protection

PI Insurance: $2M Coverage

Comprehensive professional indemnity insurance protecting clients and ensuring service delivery standards.

Why Australian Business Builders Choose EVFBS

Strategic Partnership Approach

We're not just a finance broker – we're your strategic partner committed to long-term business success and growth.

Commercial Trades Expertise

Deep specialization in commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses with exclusion of high-risk residential building.

Technology-Enhanced Service

AI-driven analytics provide superior insights and recommendations for optimal finance structure and strategic planning.

Professional Assessment

Comprehensive evaluation process ensures finance solutions align with your business goals, capacity, and growth objectives.

Transparent Communication

Clear, professional communication throughout the entire process with no hidden fees or surprise conditions.

ASIC Compliant Service

Licensed and compliant service delivery meeting all regulatory requirements and professional standards for your protection.
